subcodes.first_line: O Lord my God! All with eyes to see bear witness to Thine omnipotence and majesty,and all with ears to hear testify to Thy power
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی یشهد کل ذی بصر بعظمتک و اقتدارک و کل ذی سمع بقدرتک و قوتک و اختیارک
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @divine attributes are within all things; every atom
